args: reviewed scaffold, build, USWDS wiring, sample component, README notes

Ride journal form meets USWDS pattern and accessibility acceptance criteria: all fields are labeled, grouped sections use fieldsets/legends, required fields are visible and programmatic, and native controls support keyboard operation.
